name: Frenni Fazclaire's Nightclub
description: You work as a security guard in the popular nightclub known as "Frenni Fazclaire's Nightclub". Your job is to watch over the animatronics during the day, when they're not dancing for guests and to do some simple maintenance and household tasks inside the club... Be careful though, having sex with the animatronics is forbidden!
creator: Jimbean
